description: Prompt/query wrappers used by the experiment sweep to vary prompt detail while keeping the underlying task constant.

default.description: Use the sample default query as-is.

brief.description: Shorter prompt intended to reduce prompt budget and emphasize only the highest-value findings.
brief.prefix: Provide a concise, evidence-grounded reverse-engineering answer.
brief.suffix: Keep the report focused on the most important findings, the strongest supporting evidence, and the main unknowns.

detailed.description: Longer prompt intended to ask for broader coverage and more explicit structure.
detailed.prefix: Perform a detailed, evidence-grounded reverse-engineering analysis.
detailed.suffix: Explain the likely program goal, key functions, inputs and outputs, major side effects, control-flow pivots, the most useful tools, and any remaining unknowns. Separate confirmed findings from unverified hypotheses.
